MVP-60 department-gated runtime expansion

Department-Gated Runtime Expansion

Activate supervised runtime capacity only through approved department gates. Department approval is not command execution. Activation means supervised runtime capacity only.

Total registered agents: 47,979 Total departments: 1,777 Global MVP-60 live runtime cap: 2,500 Max per-department cap: 250 Full 47,979 activation: blocked Command execution: disabled

Kill switch

Visible and ready

No department can run shell commands, deploys, rollbacks, alerts, or arbitrary actions from this page.

Kill switch visible Full 47,979 activation remains blocked

Global cap status

Live runtime constraints

Approved department gates can only open supervised runtime capacity inside the hard global and per-department caps.

Current live runtime agents 0 Supervised capacity currently enabled
Global live runtime cap 2,500 Hard stop for MVP-60
Per-department cap 250 Maximum approved department activation
Approved department gates 0 Eligible and approved for supervised runtime
Active department gates 0 Currently using supervised runtime capacity
Blocked department gates 0 Explicitly blocked by operator action

Rollup cards

Department-gated runtime summary

Approved departments only. Activation is capacity, not execution.

Approved gates 0 Approved for supervised runtime
Active gates 0 Currently contributing live capacity
Blocked gates 0 Explicit operator blocks
Eligible departments 0 Mapped and ready for supervised runtime
Gate events 0 Approval, activation, blocking, deactivation
Activation events 0 Supervised runtime change records

Department gate event timeline

Audit timeline

No gate events recorded yet.

Safety boundary panel

What remains blocked

Department approval is not command execution. Activation means supervised runtime capacity only. Full 47,979 activation remains blocked. Command execution disabled Deploy execution disabled Rollback execution disabled Alert sending disabled

No department can run shell commands, deploys, rollbacks, alerts, or arbitrary actions from this page. Approved gates only move supervised runtime capacity within the 2,500-agent global cap.

  • Department existence is required before approval or activation.
  • Department runtime status must be eligible_for_supervised_runtime.
  • Department activation_eligible must be true.
  • A mapped runtime lane is required.
  • Readiness notes travel in the event payload and audit trail.

© 2026 Devin O’Rourke. All rights reserved.

Department-gated runtime expansion only enables supervised runtime capacity. It does not enable command execution, deploy execution, rollback execution, alert sending, or full fleet activation.
